title: FE-16 - Implementation Map For Current Codebase
description: Map truc tiep FE-16 vao codebase hien tai, trong do FE-15 da ton tai o `ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration`. Muc tieu la them user feedback cho tung `LlmSuggestion`, aggregate feedback theo endpoint, va dua feedback da sanitize quay lai suggestion generation mot cach cache-safe thong qua payload enrichment + feedback fingerprint.

techStack.architecture: Modular Monolith (CQRS via Dispatcher, IRepository<T, Guid>, schema isolation, optimistic concurrency by RowVersion)

missingForFe16: Durable per-user feedback entity/table for suggestions
Feedback summary wiring in FE-15 list/detail responses
Feedback aggregate service for prompt refinement

moduleStructure.description: Khong tao module moi. FE-16 tiep tuc song trong `ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration` vi feedback thuoc ve `LlmSuggestion` lifecycle. `ClassifiedAds.Modules.LlmAssistant` van chi giu vai tro cache/audit support.

addedFiles.description: Durable per-user feedback row for a suggestion.
Map feedback table, unique constraint, indexes, concurrency token.
CQRS write path for helpful/not-helpful feedback.
Aggregate counts shown on suggestion list/detail.
Request body for the feedback endpoint.

modifiedFiles.change: Join feedback rows needed for list summary.
Consume feedback context and include feedback fingerprint in cache key.
Add required `FeedbackContext` field per endpoint so feedback refinement stays outside the spec-only prompt builder.

expectedUnchangedFiles: ClassifiedAds.Modules.LlmAssistant/ - no durable feedback entity expected
ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration/Algorithms/Models/EndpointPromptContext.cs - feedback should not require widening this prompt-context type in the preferred design
ClassifiedAds.Modules.TestGeneration/Algorithms/ObservationConfirmationPromptBuilder.cs - keep spec/business-rule prompting focused unless payload enrichment is impossible
ClassifiedAds.WebAPI/Program.cs - host wiring should already cover TestGeneration module
ClassifiedAds.WebAPI/Dockerfile - no new project reference expected
docker-compose.yml - no new runtime dependency expected

notes: Feedback table nen denormalize `TestSuiteId` va `EndpointId` de aggregate nhanh theo suite/endpoint ma khong can join n qua lon.
Can unique index cho `(SuggestionId, UserId)` de enforce upsert semantics.
`RowVersion` nen theo repo pattern hien tai: application-managed byte[] token duoc refresh bang `Guid.NewGuid().ToByteArray()` thay vi db-generated rowversion.

Neu prompt refinement consume feedback context, `LlmScenarioSuggester.BuildCacheKey(...)` phai bao gom feedback fingerprint duoc tao tu canonical aggregated output thay vi raw row order hay timestamp.

mandatory: List/detail queries filter theo `TestSuiteId` truoc, sau do moi nap feedback rows can thiet.
Feedback context service phai aggregate theo endpoint va gioi han so note dua vao prompt.
Khong duoc query feedback tung suggestion trong loop neu co the lay theo batch.
Feedback fingerprint phai duoc tao tu du lieu da normalize va sap xep on dinh.
forbidden: Dua raw user IDs hoac note khong sanitize vao prompt context.
Thay doi FE-15 review command semantics khi chi can bo sung feedback.
Lam ban `ObservationConfirmationPromptBuilder` bang cach dua feedback free-form vao prompt spec neu payload-enrichment da du.

implementationSequence: 2. Feedback context service + feedback-aware cache key
